title: Spring Reunion
writer: Robert Alan Aurthur, Elick Moll, Robert Pirosh
actors: Dana Andrews, Betty Hutton, Jean Hagen
plot: The class of 1941 at Carson High School is holding its 15th reunion. "Boy Most Likely To Succeed" Fred Davis is in town to sell his house before taking a job in San Francisco; he's been wandering from town to town since leaving co...
